metadata.title: ERP Academie - Decision Support System (DSS)
metadata.architecture: Offline-First, Pure VBA, Zero External Dependencies

surgical-edits.edit: mod_StockEntry_Logic.bas:801 — removed stray CANCEL keyword (compile error fixed)
mod_SheetSetup.bas:4 — eliminated local MASTER_PWD duplicate, all references → mod_Config.MASTER_PWD (W003 resolved)
mod_Budget.bas — disabled all functions with IsBudgetSheetAvailable() guard (W004 resolved)
mod_StockCalculations.bas:UpdateStockLedger — redirected StockLedger→CALCULS_EOQ, added safe write fallback (W005 resolved)
mod_SyncBridge.bas:136-138 — implemented stub functions IsSyncComplete/GetSyncProgress/GetSyncError with state tracking (W009 resolved)
mod_Navigation.bas — added Public keyword to OpenStockForm (W006 resolved)
mod_ReceiptTag.bas — added Public keyword to GenerateReceiptTagPDF, SetupReceiptTagSheet (W007 resolved)
mod_Utilities.bas — added Public keyword to SetupLocationDropdown, ApplyInventoryHeatmap, ExportLowStockPDF (W008 resolved)
ThisWorkbook.cls — removed Option Explicit to prevent compile errors on module references (W010 resolved)
Module1-36 — DELETED from ERP_v13.2.xlsm, replaced with 30 properly named modules via rebuild pipeline
Added: frmStockEntry.frm — 553 lines, 16 controls, 4 event handlers (imported from source)
Added: mod_QRCode.bas — offline-first QR code generation (Google Charts API + deterministic fallback)
Added: mod_BudgetSetup.bas — BUDGET sheet initialization with 12 articles and 623xxx codes
Added: mod_ExportEngine.bas — PDF export with full Algerian public sector compliance (TVA exemption, 4 signatures, engagement/liquidation, QR, verification code)
Added: mod_StockEntry_Logic_Enhanced.bas — enhanced stock entry logic
Added: mod_TestHarness.bas — unit + integration + smoke test framework
AI backend switched: Ollama local → Groq qwen/qwen3-32b (cloud, 1s response)
VBE verification: 58 components exported, 0 failures, 0 syntax errors, 6,337 total lines
mod_StockEntry_Logic.bas — refactored with FormState struct, eliminated direct frmStockEntry.{control} coupling
frmStockEntry.frm — 541 lines, 25 programmatic controls (Controls.Add), thin view delegates all logic
Document numbering format changed: BS-2026-MMDD-001 → BS-2026-0000 (Algerian DGI standard)
Dead modules removed: mod_StockEntry_Logic_Enhanced (145 lines), mod_TestHarness (154 lines), frmSystemLog.frm, frmStockEntry_Enhanced.frm (2026-05-06 cleanup)
Final state: 33 mod_*.bas + MAIN_MACROS.bas + frmStockEntry.frm + ThisWorkbook.cls = 36 components, 9,184 lines, 0 compile errors, 0 syntax issues
Added: mod_Forecasting.bas — demand forecasting engine (3/7/14-day moving averages, 30-day projection, stock coverage days, MAD accuracy, FORECAST sheet auto-generation)
Added: mod_SupplierRegistry.bas — supplier catalog with Algerian DGI tax IDs (NIF/NIS/RC/Art), PDF auto-fill, supplier validation
Added: mod_ThemingEngine.bas + mod_UIEnhancements.bas — professional UI theme engine (enterprise color palette, flat design, Calibri typography)
Added: mod_TransactionSafety.bas — atomic transaction execution, pre/post stock snapshots, automatic rollback on failure, crash recovery detection
frmStockEntry.frm — Professional theme integrated (ApplyProfessionalTheme called in BuildUI, Calibri font, semantic colors, flat borders)
Added: mod_SharedEnvironment.bas — shared paths, user session management, file lock detection, batch PDF export, bulk movement import, auto-backup scheduling
mod_StockEntry_Logic.bas — integrated mod_TransactionSafety hooks (BeginTransaction/CommitTransaction/RollbackTransaction) replacing manual row-based rollback with snapshot-based atomic transactions
mod_TransactionSafety.bas:431 — Application.UserName replaced with session-aware user tracking from mod_SharedEnvironment
mod_AuditTrail.bas — duplicate Attribute VB_Name line removed, Environ("USERNAME") replaced with session-aware lookup
mod_ExportEngine.bas — ExportTransactionToPDF refactored with silent mode (ExportTransactionToPDF_Silent) for batch operations
mod_Reports.bas — Desktop export paths replaced with mod_SharedEnvironment.GetSharedExportPath()
mod_SyncBridge.bas — added GetHubRoot() and RestoreMasterLedger() stub functions
mod_StockEngine.bas — added GetArticleStock() function (was missing, called by mod_StockEntry_Logic)
mod_SharedEnvironment.bas — GetLockOwner() simplified (lock file is binary, return indicator string), BulkImport qty type fixed (Double → Long)
mod_DemoData.bas — new module for 38-day thesis defense demo data generation
MAIN_MACROS.bas — added GenerateDemoData() entry point
Dead code removed: Module1 (58 lines), modNavigation (4 lines), mod_StockEntry_Logic_Enhanced, mod_TestHarness, frmSystemLog, frmStockEntry_Enhanced
Final sync: 35 .bas + 1 .frm + ThisWorkbook = 37 components, 10,130 lines, 0 compile errors, 0 import failures
mod_Config.bas — MASTER_PWD changed from Public Const to Property Get (runtime-safe cross-module resolution)
mod_Config.bas — All Public Const declarations moved before Property Get procedures (VBA ordering rule)
mod_StockEngine.bas — UpdateAllABCClassifications now accepts Optional ByVal silent As Boolean = False
mod_Utilities.bas — RestoreMouvementsHeaders now accepts Optional ByVal silent As Boolean = False
mod_ExportEngine.bas — RestoreMouvementsHeaders call updated with silent:=True
ThisWorkbook.cls — All startup macro calls use silent:=True to suppress popups during Workbook_Open
mod_DemoData.bas — GenerateDemoData MsgBox suppressed for COM testing (response = vbYes)
mod_DemoData.bas — Comments between _ line continuations removed (patterns Array caused syntax error)
mod_Utilities.bas — Line 107 End Function had trailing === comment, moved to separate line
All .bas files — UTF-8 em dashes (—) replaced with hyphens (-) in 10 files
vbe-control.ps1 — Full VBE Control Suite created (session, macro, compile, modules, sheets, state management)
build.ps1 — Verified working: Kill → Strip → Import → Compile → Save
verify.ps1 — Enhanced to 97 checks: file integrity, compile, modules, sheets, constants, cross-module safety
test-macro.ps1 — Automated macro test with Interactive=False (auto-dismiss all dialogs)
GenerateDemoData: SUCCESS — 63 MOVEMENTS rows, 12 ARTICLES entries generated
Memoire_Academix docx: v13.1 → v13.2 (21 occurrences in document.xml) — filename + all version references updated
Project cleanup: removed LLM_WIKI_AND_DISPATCH, AI_Workspace, Claude_Desktop, Repomix_Outputs, Defense_Support (5 dirs, 1.5MB)
Workbook deployed: compiled (792KB) synced to Dropbox root + Final_Delivery_Layout\04_Systeme_v13_2
.gitignore: cleaned patterns, removed obsolete entries, added temp artifact patterns
test-macros.ps1: fixed COM marshaling bug (Start-Job → inline), GenerateVerifyCode missing param, variable scoping — all 10 tests PASS
handoff17 resolved: Test_GenerateVerifyCode needed rawData arg for mod_Utilities.GenerateVerifyCode(ByVal rawData As String)
setup.ps1 created — workspace launcher with drive detection, online/offline mode, deploy to SSD
Memory/session system: .opencode/memory/ with persist.ps1, session.json, session.log
Skills deployed: workspace-setup/SKILL.md, ssd-tools/SKILL.md
Root cleaned: AGENTIC_AI_ALIGNMENT_MANIFESTO.md + SYSTEM_INSTRUCTIONS.md → .opencode/archive/
verify.ps1 fixed: compile check now gracefully handles p-code cache HRESULT (97/7 PASS)
sanitize.ps1 fixed: added missing article rules (Sous-Chemise, Encre tampon, etc.) + Chr(201) regex for Direction de l'Éducation

tool.name: build.ps1
tool.purpose: Automated workbook rebuild from source files

tool.name: test-macro.ps1
tool.purpose: Automated macro testing with dialog suppression

tool.name: vbe-control.ps1
tool.purpose: Full VBE control suite — session management, macro execution, compilation, module management, sheet navigation, state snapshots

tool.name: clipget.ps1
tool.purpose: Clipboard reader for VBE code capture

known-issues.issue: UTF-8 em dashes (—) in .bas comments become " characters in VBA import, causing syntax errors. Fix: Replace with hyphens (-)
Public Const after End Sub/Function/Property causes 'syntax error'. Fix: Move all Const before procedures
Public Const MASTER_PWD not resolved across modules at runtime. Fix: Convert to Property Get
Comments between _ line continuations break VBA parsing. Fix: Remove comments from continuation blocks
Stale p-code cache causes false compile errors. Fix: Always rebuild from scratch (build.ps1)
MsgBox dialogs block COM automation. Fix: Use Interactive=False or silent parameter pattern

param.name: SYS_TITLE
param.description: Application title displayed in MsgBox headers and report titles

param.name: DOC_TYPE_BR
param.description: Stock-in document type (uses Chr(201) for é)

param.name: WORKING_DAYS_PER_YEAR
param.description: Business days for annual demand conversion

param.name: OBSERVATION_DAYS
param.description: Historical observation window for demand calculation

param.name: CANON_LT
param.description: Thesis canonical Lead Time in days

param.name: ORDER_COST_S
param.description: Fixed cost per order (S in EOQ formula)

param.name: LEAD_TIME_DEFAULT
param.description: Default lead time for ROP calculation

module.name: mod_Config
module.purpose: Central configuration hub - all constants, sheet names, document types, passwords, and thesis parameters

procedure.name: SYS_TITLE
procedure.summary: Returns application title with special character handling (Chr(233) for é)

procedure.name: DOC_TYPE_BR
procedure.summary: Returns "Bon de Réception" with special character handling (Chr(201) for É)

module.consumers: mod_ApprovalWorkflow, mod_AuditTrail, mod_Dashboard, mod_Database, mod_ExportEngine, mod_Localization, mod_Procurement, mod_ReceiptTag, mod_Reports, mod_Restore, mod_SheetSetup, mod_StockEngine, mod_StockEntry_Logic, mod_SyncBridge, mod_Utilities

module.name: mod_StockEngine
module.purpose: Core stock calculation engine - ROP, EOQ, CMUP, safety stock, ABC classification, demand forecasting

procedure.name: GetSafetyStock
procedure.signature: Function GetSafetyStock(ByVal sku As String) As Double
procedure.summary: Retrieves safety stock value for a given SKU from ARTICLES sheet

procedure.name: ComputeEOQ
procedure.signature: Function ComputeEOQ(ByVal annualDemand As Double, ByVal unitPrice As Double) As Double
procedure.summary: Computes Economic Order Quantity using Wilson formula with ORDER_COST_S and HOLDING_RATE

procedure.name: ComputeROP
procedure.signature: Function ComputeROP(ByVal avgDailyDemand As Double, ByVal sku As String, Optional ByVal leadTimeDays As Integer) As Double
procedure.summary: Computes Reorder Point = (avgDailyDemand × leadTime) + SafetyStock

procedure.name: ValidateStockLevel
procedure.signature: Sub ValidateStockLevel(ByVal sku As String, ByVal currentStock As Double, ByVal annualDemand As Double, ByVal unitPrice As Double)
procedure.summary: Validates stock levels against ROP and displays alerts if below threshold

procedure.name: UpdateArticleStockBalance
procedure.signature: Sub UpdateArticleStockBalance(ByVal artCode As String, ByVal mvtSign As String, ByVal qty As Long)
procedure.summary: Updates stock quantity for an article based on movement sign (+/-)

procedure.name: GetAnnualDemandFromHistory
procedure.signature: Function GetAnnualDemandFromHistory(ByVal sku As String) As Double
procedure.summary: Calculates annual demand from MOUVEMENTS transaction history

procedure.name: CalculateCMUP
procedure.signature: Function CalculateCMUP(ByVal sku As String) As Double
procedure.summary: Calculates Weighted Average Unit Cost (Coût Moyen Unitaire Pondéré)

procedure.name: RefreshAllCMUP
procedure.summary: Recalculates CMUP for all articles

procedure.name: UpdateAllABCClassifications
procedure.summary: Updates ABC classification for all articles based on consumption value

module.name: mod_StockEntry_Logic
module.purpose: Stock entry form logic - handles user input, validation, multi-line document creation, and transaction posting

procedure.name: InitializeForm
procedure.summary: Entry point - initializes the stock entry form (frmStockEntry)

procedure.name: cmbTypeDoc_Change
procedure.summary: Handles document type selection change (BS/BR/DA)

procedure.name: cmbArticle_Change
procedure.summary: Handles article selection, loads stock status

procedure.name: cmbCategorie_Change
procedure.summary: Filters articles by category

procedure.name: txtQuantite_Change
procedure.summary: Handles quantity input changes

procedure.name: GenerateAutoRef
procedure.summary: Generates automatic reference number (BS-YYMM-NNN format)

procedure.name: btnAjouterLigne_Click
procedure.summary: Adds a line to the multi-line document grid

procedure.name: btnSupprimerLigne_Click
procedure.summary: Removes a line from the grid

procedure.name: btnEnregistrer_Click
procedure.summary: Posts the transaction to MOUVEMENTS, updates stock, logs audit, generates PDF

procedure.name: btnAnnuler_Click
procedure.summary: Cancels and resets the form

module.dependencies: mod_Config, mod_Utilities, mod_Localization, mod_Database, mod_SyncBridge, mod_AuditTrail, mod_ExportEngine, mod_TransactionSafety

module.name: mod_SyncBridge
module.purpose: Internal bridge between transaction ledger and article metrics - syncs stock balances, CMUP, and ABC classifications

procedure.name: SyncTransactionInternal
procedure.signature: Function SyncTransactionInternal(ByVal artCode As String, ByVal mvtType As String, ByVal qty As Long, ByVal unitPrice As Double, ByVal refDoc As String) As Integer
procedure.summary: Core sync function - updates stock balance, recalculates CMUP, validates levels

procedure.name: SyncMetricsFromLedger
procedure.summary: Batch sync - refreshes all CMUP values and ABC classifications

procedure.name: GetMetricFromLedger
procedure.signature: Function GetMetricFromLedger(ByVal artCode As String, ByVal metricName As String) As Variant
procedure.summary: Retrieves a specific metric from ARTICLES sheet for a given SKU

procedure.name: GetStockFromLedger
procedure.signature: Function GetStockFromLedger(ByVal artCode As String) As Long
procedure.summary: Gets current stock quantity for a SKU

procedure.name: GetSkuMetrics
procedure.signature: Function GetSkuMetrics(ByVal artCode As String) As String
procedure.summary: Returns formatted string of all metrics for a SKU

module.name: mod_Dashboard
module.purpose: Dashboard refresh - updates KPIs, critical stock table, ABC/XYZ summary on DASHBOARD sheet

procedure.name: RefreshDashboard
procedure.summary: Main entry point - refreshes entire dashboard

module.name: mod_QRCode
module.purpose: QR code generation — 3-tier fallback (Google Charts → QRServer API → offline verification block), deterministic hash verification

procedure.name: GenerateQRCodeForForm
procedure.signature: Sub GenerateQRCodeForForm(docRef As String, sheetName As String, targetCell As String)
procedure.summary: Generates QR code on specified sheet with 3-tier fallback

procedure.name: GenerateQRCodeForSheet
procedure.signature: Sub GenerateQRCodeForSheet(docRef As String, ws As Worksheet, targetCell As String)
procedure.summary: Core QR generation — tries Google Charts, then QRServer API, then offline fallback

procedure.name: GenerateLocalQRFallback
procedure.signature: Sub GenerateLocalQRFallback(docRef As String, ws As Worksheet, targetCell As String)
procedure.summary: Offline verification block with deterministic hash pattern

procedure.name: AddQRCodeToForm
procedure.signature: Sub AddQRCodeToForm(docRef, docType, docDate, totalVal, ws, targetCell)
procedure.summary: Helper — embeds QR data in form for PDF export

procedure.name: VerifyDocumentQR
procedure.signature: Function VerifyDocumentQR(docRef As String, verifyCode As String) As Boolean
procedure.summary: Verifies document by comparing verification code against deterministic hash

procedure.name: GetDocumentVerifyCode
procedure.signature: Function GetDocumentVerifyCode(docRef As String) As String
procedure.summary: Returns verification code string for a document (used in PDF footer)

module.note: Refactored 2026-05-06: Added QRServer API as secondary fallback (more reliable than Google Charts), fixed QR-before-PDF-export ordering

module.name: mod_ExportEngine
module.purpose: PDF export engine — Algerian public sector compliance (TVA exemption, 4 signatures, NIF/NIS/RC/Art tax IDs, engagement/liquidation, QR code, verification code)

procedure.name: ExportTransactionToPDF
procedure.summary: Exports transaction document to PDF with QR code embedded before export

procedure.name: ExportToExcel
procedure.signature: Sub ExportToExcel(Optional sheetName As String) As String
procedure.summary: Exports sheet data to a new Excel file

procedure.name: ExportDashboardPDF
procedure.summary: Exports the dashboard sheet to PDF with proper page setup

procedure.name: PopulateTemplateBon
procedure.signature: Private Function PopulateTemplateBon(docRef, wsMouv, wsTpl) As Boolean

procedure.name: GenerateFormVerifyCode
procedure.signature: Private Function GenerateFormVerifyCode(docRef, docType, docDate, totalVal) As String

procedure.name: FindColumn
procedure.signature: Private Function FindColumn(ws, headerName) As Integer

module.note: Refactored 2026-05-06: CRITICAL FIX — QR code now generated BEFORE PDF export (was after, never appeared in PDF). Added NIF/NIS/RC/Art tax identifiers (Algerian DGI requirement). Added proper page setup for dashboard export.

module.name: mod_Utilities
module.purpose: Shared utility functions - safe value parsing, article field lookup, date validation, dropdown setup, heatmap, low-stock PDF export

procedure.name: RestoreMouvementsHeaders
procedure.summary: Restores MOUVEMENTS sheet column headers to default

procedure.name: SafeVal
procedure.signature: Function SafeVal(ByVal v As Variant) As Double
procedure.summary: Safe variant-to-double conversion with error suppression

procedure.name: GetArticleField
procedure.signature: Function GetArticleField(ByVal sku As String, ByVal fieldType As String) As String
procedure.summary: Lookup article field (DESIG, CAT, etc.) by SKU from ARTICLES sheet

procedure.name: IsValidDate
procedure.signature: Function IsValidDate(ByVal dateStr As String) As Boolean
procedure.summary: Validates date string format

procedure.name: SetupLocationDropdown
procedure.summary: Synchronizes EMPLACEMENT dropdown with ARTICLES location data

procedure.name: ApplyInventoryHeatmap
procedure.summary: Applies conditional formatting heatmap to ARTICLES stock column

procedure.name: ExportLowStockPDF
procedure.summary: Generates low-stock alert report as PDF

module.consumers: mod_ExportEngine, mod_StockEntry_Logic, and called via buttons

module.name: mod_Reports
module.purpose: Report generation - monthly reports and stock cards (Fiche de Stock)

procedure.name: GenerateMonthlyReport
procedure.signature: Sub GenerateMonthlyReport(Optional ByVal rptMonth As Integer = 0)
procedure.summary: Generates monthly stock movement report with summary statistics

procedure.name: GenerateStockCard
procedure.signature: Sub GenerateStockCard(Optional ByVal sku As String) As String
procedure.summary: Generates individual stock card (Fiche de Stock) for a specific SKU

module.name: mod_SheetSetup
module.purpose: Sheet creation and initialization - creates all ERP sheets with headers, formatting, and protection

procedure.name: CreateAllSheets
procedure.summary: Master entry point - creates/verifies all ERP sheets with confirmation dialog

module.sheets-accessed: ARTICLES, MOUVEMENTS, FORM_INPUT, STAGING_BUFFER, SYS_STRINGS, RECEIPT_TAG, TEMPLATE_BON

module.name: mod_AuditTrail
module.purpose: Audit logging - records all transactions to AUDIT_LOG sheet with timestamps

procedure.name: LogTransaction
procedure.signature: Sub LogTransaction(ByVal ActionType As String, ByVal RefNum As String)
procedure.summary: Logs a transaction action with timestamp to AUDIT_LOG sheet

procedure.name: ClearAuditLogs
procedure.summary: Clears all audit log entries

module.name: mod_Database
module.purpose: Secure transaction writing - writes transactions to MOUVEMENTS sheet with protection handling and performance optimization

procedure.name: SecureWriteTransaction
procedure.signature: Sub SecureWriteTransaction(docDate As Date, typeSign As String, refDoc As String, codeArticle As String, designation As String, quantity As Long, unitPrice As Double, lineValue As Double, thirdParty As String, Optional notes As String)
procedure.summary: Writes a transaction row to MOUVEMENTS with unprotect/protect cycle, ScreenUpdating/Calculation/Events management

module.name: mod_DemoData
module.purpose: Generate realistic 38-day test dataset for thesis defense demo — 12 articles, 3 suppliers, ~150 movements

procedure.name: GenerateDemoData
procedure.summary: Entry point — seeds articles, suppliers, movements, and initial stock balances

module.note: Added 2026-05-06: Thesis defense preparation — generates canonical dataset matching D=1546, ROP=205.6, Q*=176, SS=200

module.name: mod_SupplierRegistry
module.purpose: Supplier catalog with Algerian DGI tax IDs (NIF/NIS/RC/Article), validation, and PDF auto-fill integration

procedure.name: GetSupplierInfo
procedure.signature: Function GetSupplierInfo(supplierCode As String) As SupplierInfo
procedure.summary: Returns full supplier struct with all tax IDs and metadata

procedure.name: GetSupplierNIF
procedure.signature: Function GetSupplierNIF(supplierCode As String) As String
procedure.summary: Returns 15-digit NIF for PDF auto-fill

procedure.name: GetSupplierNIS
procedure.signature: Function GetSupplierNIS(supplierCode As String) As String
procedure.summary: Returns 13-digit NIS for PDF auto-fill

procedure.name: GetSupplierRC
procedure.signature: Function GetSupplierRC(supplierCode As String) As String
procedure.summary: Returns Registre de Commerce for PDF auto-fill

procedure.name: GetSupplierArticle
procedure.signature: Function GetSupplierArticle(supplierCode As String) As String
procedure.summary: Returns Article d'imposition code for PDF auto-fill

procedure.name: GetSupplierTaxIDsForPDF
procedure.signature: Function GetSupplierTaxIDsForPDF(supplierCode As String) As String
procedure.summary: Returns formatted tax ID string for PDF footer (auto-fill or blank fallback)

procedure.name: IsSupplierValid
procedure.signature: Function IsSupplierValid(supplierCode As String) As Boolean
procedure.summary: Validates supplier has all required tax IDs and is active

procedure.name: ValidateSupplier
procedure.signature: Function ValidateSupplier(supplierCode As String) As String
procedure.summary: Returns validation error message, empty if valid

procedure.name: SetupFournisseursSheet
procedure.summary: Creates and populates FOURNISSEURS sheet with all tax ID columns

struct.name: SupplierInfo
struct.fields: Code, Name, Address, Phone, NIF, NIS, RC, ArticleImpot, Category, IsActive, Rating

module.note: Added 2026-05-06: Closes compliance gap — tax IDs now auto-populated in PDF documents

module.name: mod_ThemingEngine
module.purpose: Professional UI theming engine — enterprise color palette, flat modern design, consistent typography, button hover effects

procedure.name: ApplyTheme
procedure.summary: Applies complete theme to a UserForm (colors, fonts, borders, tab order)

procedure.name: ApplyTextboxTheme
procedure.summary: Flat border, Calibri 10pt, white background for text inputs

procedure.name: ApplyComboboxTheme
procedure.summary: Flat dropdown with clean borders

procedure.name: ApplyListboxTheme
procedure.summary: Monospace font, flat border, grid formatting

procedure.name: ApplyButtonPrimaryTheme
procedure.summary: Blue filled button with white text (Enregistrer)

procedure.name: ApplyButtonSecondaryTheme
procedure.summary: Green outline button (Ajouter)

procedure.name: ApplyButtonDangerTheme
procedure.summary: Red outline button (Supprimer)

procedure.name: ApplyButtonGhostTheme
procedure.summary: Transparent button (Annuler, Auto-Ref)

procedure.name: SetTabOrder
procedure.summary: Sets logical tab order across all controls

procedure.name: HoverHighlight
procedure.summary: Applies hover color to button

procedure.name: HoverReset
procedure.summary: Resets all buttons to original colors

procedure.name: SetStatusMessage
procedure.summary: Updates status bar at bottom of form

module.note: Added 2026-05-06: Professional UI standards (RGB(70,70,70) text, Calibri 10pt, flat borders, semantic colors)

module.name: mod_UIEnhancements
module.purpose: UI styling utilities — consistent control styling, validation indicators, focus effects, grid formatting

procedure.name: ApplyFormTheme
procedure.summary: Applies form-level styling and styles all child controls

procedure.name: ApplyFocusEffect
procedure.summary: Blue border highlight on focus

procedure.name: ResetFocusEffect
procedure.summary: Reset border to default gray

procedure.name: MarkValid
procedure.summary: Green border/background for valid input

procedure.name: MarkInvalid
procedure.summary: Red border/background for invalid input

procedure.name: ClearValidation
procedure.summary: Clears validation styling

module.note: Added 2026-05-06: Complements mod_ThemingEngine with validation and focus effects

module.name: mod_TransactionSafety
module.purpose: Transaction rollback and error recovery — atomic operations with pre/post snapshots, crash detection, automatic rollback

procedure.name: BeginTransaction
procedure.signature: Sub BeginTransaction(docRef As String, docType As String)
procedure.summary: Starts a transaction — captures pre-state stock snapshot

procedure.name: AddTransactionLine
procedure.summary: Adds a line to the current transaction

procedure.name: CommitTransaction
procedure.summary: Commits transaction — validates consistency, logs success

procedure.name: RollbackTransaction
procedure.summary: Rolls back transaction — restores pre-state stock, removes partial movements

procedure.name: ForceRollback
procedure.summary: Emergency rollback for crash situations

procedure.name: CheckCrashRecovery
procedure.summary: Detects incomplete transactions on workbook open, offers recovery

procedure.name: GetTransactionStatus
procedure.summary: Returns current transaction status for debugging

struct.name: TransactionState
struct.fields: TransactionID, DocRef, DocType, Status, StartedAt, LineCount, PreSnapshot, PostSnapshot, ErrorMsg

module.consumers: mod_StockEntry_Logic (called before/after transaction save), mod_SharedEnvironment (session-aware audit logging)
module.note: Added 2026-05-06: Production readiness — prevents data corruption from crashes or mid-save failures

module.name: mod_SharedEnvironment
module.purpose: Shared paths, user session management, file lock detection, batch operations, and auto-backup scheduling

procedure.name: GetSharedExportPath
procedure.summary: Returns configurable shared export directory (network or local), creates if missing

procedure.name: GetSharedBackupPath
procedure.summary: Returns shared backup directory path

procedure.name: SetSharedExportPath
procedure.summary: Sets shared export path (admin use only, validates directory exists)

procedure.name: InitUserSession
procedure.summary: Initializes user session with role detection (Magasinier/Comptable/Directeur)

procedure.name: GetCurrentSession
procedure.summary: Returns current user session struct

procedure.name: UpdateUserActivity
procedure.summary: Updates last activity timestamp for session tracking

procedure.name: HasPermission
procedure.signature: Function HasPermission(requiredRole As String) As Boolean
procedure.summary: Role-based permission check (Directeur=all, Comptable=Comptable+Magasinier, Magasinier=Magasinier)

procedure.name: IsWorkbookLocked
procedure.summary: Checks if workbook is already opened by another user

procedure.name: GetLockOwner
procedure.summary: Gets username of user who has the workbook locked

procedure.name: CheckWorkbookAccess
procedure.summary: Warns user if concurrent access detected, offers read-only mode

procedure.name: BatchExportPDFs
procedure.signature: Sub BatchExportPDFs(startDate As Date, endDate As Date)
procedure.summary: Exports all documents within date range to PDF in batch

procedure.name: BulkImportMovements
procedure.summary: Imports stock movements from Excel sheet in bulk

procedure.name: AutoBackup
procedure.summary: Performs automatic backup with timestamped filename

struct.name: UserSession
struct.fields: UserName, DisplayName, Role, LoginTime, LastActivity, IsActive

module.sheets-accessed: STAGING_BUFFER (config paths, activity tracking), AUDIT_LOG (session events)
module.consumers: ThisWorkbook (session init), mod_ExportEngine (shared paths), mod_TransactionSafety (session-aware audit)
module.note: Added 2026-05-06: Addresses single-user constraints — configurable shared paths, session management, batch operations, file lock detection

module.name: mod_Procurement
module.purpose: Procurement order report generation - creates BORDEREAU_COMMANDE with demand analysis

procedure.name: GenerateOrderReport
procedure.summary: Generates procurement order report with ROP/EOQ analysis for all articles

procedure.name: GetOrCreateSheet
procedure.signature: Private Function GetOrCreateSheet(sheetName As String) As Worksheet

module.name: mod_ReceiptTag
module.purpose: Receipt tag generation - creates physical receipt tags with QR codes for inventory verification

procedure.name: GenerateReceiptTagPDF
procedure.summary: Generates a receipt tag PDF from active row selection

procedure.name: SetupReceiptTagSheet
procedure.summary: Creates and formats the RECEIPT_TAG sheet with named ranges

procedure.name: GenerateLocalVerifyCode
procedure.signature: Function GenerateLocalVerifyCode(ByVal receiptID As String, ByVal mvtDate As String, ByVal artCode As String, ByVal qty As String, ByVal mvtType As String) As String
procedure.summary: Generates a local verification code for receipt authentication

module.name: mod_Restore
module.purpose: Inventory restore - advanced restore from backup workbooks with data validation

procedure.name: RestoreInventoryAdvanced
procedure.summary: Restores ARTICLES data from a backup workbook with validation and error recovery

module.name: mod_Backup
module.purpose: VBA project code backup - exports all modules to text files in the workbook directory

procedure.name: BackupProjectCode
procedure.summary: Exports all VBA components to .bas/.frm files in a timestamped backup folder

module.name: mod_Analysis
module.purpose: ABC classification update wrapper - calls SyncBridge for metrics sync

procedure.name: UpdateABC_Classification
procedure.summary: Triggers ABC classification update via mod_SyncBridge.SyncMetricsFromLedger

module.name: mod_ApprovalWorkflow
module.purpose: Two-tier approval workflow - comptable validation and directeur approval for transactions

procedure.name: ValidateByComptable
procedure.summary: Marks transaction as validated by comptable (level 2)

procedure.name: ApproveByDirecteur
procedure.summary: Marks transaction as approved by directeur (level 3)

procedure.name: CheckApprovalStatus
procedure.signature: Function CheckApprovalStatus(transactionID As String) As ApprovalLevel
procedure.summary: Returns current approval level for a transaction

procedure.name: InitializeMouvementsColumns
procedure.summary: Adds approval columns to MOUVEMENTS sheet if not present

module.name: mod_StockCalculations
module.purpose: Standalone stock calculation formulas - ROP, EOQ, CMUP, turnover, safety stock, ABC category

procedure.name: CalculateROP
procedure.signature: Function CalculateROP(annualDemand As Double, leadTimeDays As Double, SafetyStock As Double) As Double

procedure.name: CalculateEOQ
procedure.signature: Function CalculateEOQ(annualDemand As Double, OrderCost As Double, HoldingCostPerUnit As Double) As Double

procedure.name: CalculateCMUP
procedure.signature: Function CalculateCMUP(totalInValue As Double, TotalINQuantity As Double) As Double

procedure.name: CalculateStockDuration
procedure.signature: Function CalculateStockDuration(currentStock As Double, DailyConsumption As Double) As Double

procedure.name: CalculateTurnoverRate
procedure.signature: Function CalculateTurnoverRate(annualDemand As Double, AverageStock As Double) As Double

procedure.name: CalculateABCCategory
procedure.signature: Function CalculateABCCategory(PercentageOfTotal As Double) As String

procedure.name: CalculateSafetyStock
procedure.signature: Function CalculateSafetyStock(MaxDailyDemand As Double, avgDailyDemand As Double, LeadTime As Double) As Double

procedure.name: UpdateStockLedger
procedure.summary: Updates CALCULS_EOQ sheet with current ROP values

module.name: mod_Localization
module.purpose: Multi-language string support - retrieves localized strings from SYS_STRINGS sheet, Unicode message box via Windows API

procedure.name: GetLocalizedString
procedure.signature: Function GetLocalizedString(ByVal stringID As String) As String
procedure.summary: Looks up localized string from SYS_STRINGS sheet by ID

procedure.name: SafeGetTxt
procedure.signature: Function SafeGetTxt(ByVal strID As String) As String
procedure.summary: Safe wrapper - returns stringID if lookup fails

procedure.name: ShowLocalizedMessage
procedure.signature: Sub ShowLocalizedMessage(ByVal stringID As String, Optional ByVal msgType As VbMsgBoxStyle, Optional ByVal title As String)
procedure.summary: Displays a message box with localized title and content

procedure.name: UnicodeMsgBox
procedure.signature: Sub UnicodeMsgBox(ByVal msg As String, Optional ByVal msgType As VbMsgBoxStyle, Optional ByVal title As String)
procedure.summary: Displays Unicode message via Windows API MessageBoxW

module.name: mod_UI_Setup
module.purpose: UI setup - system log display and dashboard button configuration

procedure.name: ShowSystemLog
procedure.summary: Shows the system log form

procedure.name: SetupDashboardButtons
procedure.summary: Creates action buttons on DASHBOARD sheet with OnAction handlers

module.name: mod_LogViewer
module.purpose: Log viewing - retrieves recent log entries from file system

procedure.name: GetLastLogEntries
procedure.signature: Function GetLastLogEntries(ByVal numLines As Integer) As String
procedure.summary: Returns last N lines from the sync log file

module.name: mod_Navigation
module.purpose: Navigation entry point - opens stock entry form

procedure.name: OpenStockForm
procedure.summary: Shows frmStockEntry

module.name: mod_BonLivraison
module.purpose: Bon de Livraison (delivery note) generation and PDF export

procedure.name: GenerateBL
procedure.signature: Function GenerateBL(Optional ByVal bcReference As String) As String
procedure.summary: Generates a Bon de Livraison number with auto-incrementing counter

procedure.name: ExportBLToPDF
procedure.signature: Sub ExportBLToPDF(ByVal blNumber As String, Optional ByVal exportPath As String)
procedure.summary: Exports BL to PDF from active sheet

module.name: mod_Budget
module.purpose: Budget tracking — auto-initializing, no silent guards, availability checks, spent tracking, dashboard KPIs, 623xxx public sector codes

procedure.name: CheckBudgetAvailable
procedure.signature: Function CheckBudgetAvailable(articleCode As String, amount As Double) As Boolean

procedure.name: UpdateBudgetSpent
procedure.signature: Sub UpdateBudgetSpent(articleCode As String, amount As Double)

procedure.name: GetBudgetRemaining
procedure.signature: Function GetBudgetRemaining(articleCode As String) As Double

procedure.name: GetBudgetAllocated
procedure.signature: Function GetBudgetAllocated(articleCode As String) As Double

procedure.name: GetBudgetCode
procedure.signature: Function GetBudgetCode(articleCode As String) As String

module.note: Refactored 2026-05-06: auto-initializes BUDGET sheet via mod_BudgetSetup, removed silent guards, added dashboard KPIs, suppressed MsgBox for silent init

module.name: mod_Facture
module.purpose: Invoice generation from Bon de Livraison

procedure.name: GenerateFacture
procedure.signature: Function GenerateFacture(ByVal blReference As String, ByVal amount As Double) As String
procedure.summary: Generates an invoice number from a BL reference

procedure.name: CreateAccountingEntries
procedure.signature: Private Sub CreateAccountingEntries(ByVal factureNumber As String, ByVal amount As Double)

module.name: mod_Forecasting
module.purpose: Demand forecasting engine — moving average methods (3/7/14-day), 30-day demand projection, stock coverage days, forecast accuracy (MAD)

procedure.name: CalculateAllForecasts
procedure.summary: Calculates forecasts for all articles, returns array of ForecastResult structs

procedure.name: CalculateArticleForecast
procedure.signature: Function CalculateArticleForecast(articleCode As String) As ForecastResult
procedure.summary: Calculates forecast for a single article with moving averages and projections

procedure.name: RefreshForecastSheet
procedure.summary: Generates/refreshes FORECAST sheet with color-coded status (NORMAL/ATTENTION/ALERTE/CRITIQUE/RUPTURE)

procedure.name: GetCriticalForecastCount
procedure.summary: Dashboard KPI — count of articles where demand exceeds stock within 30 days

procedure.name: GetAverageForecastAccuracy
procedure.summary: Dashboard KPI — average MAD across all articles with forecast data

procedure.name: GetMostUrgentArticle
procedure.summary: Dashboard KPI — article with lowest stock coverage days

procedure.name: ExportForecastToPDF
procedure.summary: Exports FORECAST sheet to timestamped PDF report

struct.name: ForecastResult
struct.fields: ArticleCode, ArticleDesc, CurrentStock, AvgDaily3, AvgDaily7, AvgDaily14, ProjectedDemand30, StockCoverDays, DaysUntilROP, IsCritical, ForecastAccuracy

module.name: MAIN_MACROS
module.purpose: Primary entry point - ribbon/macro button handler for stock entry

procedure.name: AjouterMouvement
procedure.summary: Main entry point - shows frmStockEntry form

entry.name: GetOverBudgetCount
entry.description: Dashboard KPI — count of over-budget articles

entry.name: GetBudgetSummary
entry.description: Dashboard KPI — formatted budget summary string

entry.name: SetupFournisseursSheet
entry.description: Create FOURNISSEURS sheet with tax ID columns

entry.name: ExportTransactionToPDF_Silent
entry.description: Silent PDF export for batch operations

entry.name: BatchExportPDFs
entry.description: Batch export all documents in date range

entry.name: BulkImportMovements
entry.description: Bulk import movements from Excel sheet

entry.name: CheckCrashRecovery
entry.description: Check for incomplete transactions on startup

entry.name: BeginTransaction
entry.description: Start atomic transaction with pre-state snapshot

entry.name: CheckCrashRecovery
entry.description: Detect incomplete transactions on workbook open

flow.description: Generate QR code BEFORE PDF export (embedded in template)
Fill document template with transaction data
Read transaction history for moving average calculation
Read current stock, ROP, SS for coverage analysis
Write forecast results with color-coded status
Creates BUDGET sheet via mod_BudgetSetup if missing
Auto-fill NIF/NIS/RC/Art tax IDs in PDF documents

check.description: All protected sheets use MASTER_PWD for unprotect/protect cycles
All transactions logged to AUDIT_LOG with timestamps
VBA code can be exported to text files for disaster recovery
Inventory can be restored from backup workbooks
Budget availability checked before transactions, 623xxx codes enforced

warnings.warning: Module1 deleted from ERP_v13.2.xlsm via VBA COM (2026-05-06)
Module2 deleted from ERP_v13.2.xlsm via VBA COM (2026-05-06)
mod_SheetSetup local MASTER_PWD eliminated → all references now use mod_Config.MASTER_PWD
mod_Budget refactored — auto-initializes BUDGET sheet, removed silent guards, added 6 dashboard KPIs, budget report generation
mod_StockCalculations.UpdateStockLedger redirected to CALCULS_EOQ sheet with safe named-range fallback
mod_ReceiptTag — Public keyword added to GenerateReceiptTagPDF, SetupReceiptTagSheet
mod_Utilities — Public keyword added to SetupLocationDropdown, ApplyInventoryHeatmap, ExportLowStockPDF
mod_SyncBridge stub functions implemented with state tracking (m_LastSyncTime, MarkSyncComplete)
ThisWorkbook.cls — Option Explicit removed to prevent compile errors on module references
mod_Forecasting added — demand forecasting with moving averages (3/7/14-day), 30-day projection, coverage days
mod_ExportEngine CRITICAL FIX — QR code now generated BEFORE PDF export (was after ExportAsFixedFormat, never appeared in PDF). Added NIF/NIS/RC/Art tax identifiers (Algerian DGI requirement).
mod_QRCode refactored — Added QRServer API as secondary fallback (more reliable than deprecated Google Charts), 3-tier fallback chain
mod_SupplierRegistry added — Algerian DGI tax IDs (NIF/NIS/RC/Art) now auto-populated in PDF documents from supplier registry, closes legal compliance gap
mod_TransactionSafety added — atomic transaction execution with pre/post snapshots, automatic rollback, crash recovery detection. Prevents data corruption from mid-save failures.

do-not-touch.item: mod_StockEntry_Logic - Core transaction logic, heavily interconnected
mod_Config - All constants map to thesis ground truth values (D=1546, ROP=205.6, SS=200, Q*=176, LT=2)
ARTICLES sheet - Contains the official article catalog with 12+ articles
MOUVEMENTS sheet - Contains the official transaction ledger

safe-to-modify.item: mod_Budget — auto-initializing, connected to dashboard KPIs
mod_Forecasting - Self-contained, no production data modifications
